title: erigeron altissimus
intro: Erigeron altissimus, also known as tall fleabane or tall daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to eastern North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron altissimus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
